task: Predicting Stellar Class (multiclass: GALAXY / QSO / STAR)

my_lr_stacker.note: GBDTs + PyTorch MLP -> LR meta (own implementation)

mega_stack.note: LR meta incl. external RealMLP + public LR-stacker (Deotte)

engineering_notes.gpu_bug: Kaggle assigned Tesla P100 (sm_60); preinstalled torch 2.10+cu128 supports sm_70+ only. Fix: reinstall torch cu118 before import.
engineering_notes.stacking_lesson: Stacking only helps with diverse strong base models; 4 correlated GBDTs (~0.99) gave no lift over a plain blend.
engineering_notes.realmlp_gap: Out-of-the-box pytabkit RealMLP scored 0.946 vs tuned public RealMLP 0.969 — the gap is NN architecture tuning.
